testcase.name: test_admin_update_contract
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_est_contract_iter50.py:114: in test_admin_update_contract assert update_resp.status_code == 200, f"Failed to update contract: {update_resp.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to update contract: {"detail":"Admin only"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_admin_update_contract_empty_rejected

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400 for empty text, got 403 assert 403 == 400 + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_est_contract_iter50.py:139: in test_admin_update_contract_empty_rejected assert resp.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400 for empty text, got {resp.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400 for empty text, got 403 E assert 403 == 400 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
